sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint says seeded continuation must fail closed when destination or binding proof is insufficient, but it does not publish the exact downgrade reason catalog.
decisionTaken: Seeded downgrades to challenge only when bounded continuation remains lawful and carries TEL_CONT_192_DESTINATION_NOT_VERIFIED_FOR_SEEDED, TEL_CONT_192_HIGH_ASSURANCE_BINDING_REQUIRED_FOR_SEEDED, TEL_CONT_192_SCOPE_FENCE_REQUIRED_FOR_SEEDED, or TEL_CONT_192_RELEASE_OR_CHANNEL_POSTURE_NARROWED.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The downgrade preserves continuity without exposing seeded patient data before a fresh challenge succeeds.
operationalRisk: If reason codes are incomplete, support may misclassify why a caller saw challenge posture instead of seeded posture.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add new reason codes to the contract, validator, and 192_continuation_eligibility_to_grant_matrix.csv before enabling new seeded gates.
